purpose: Define the minimum evidence needed before an internal W/Z coupling-like quantity may be used as an electroweak scale bridge.

requiredEvidence.requirement: declares how internal coupling amplitudes are normalized to a dimensionless weak coupling
declares the replayable relation connecting the electroweak scale to W/Z internal modes
demonstrates that W and Z imply one shared GeV-per-internal-mass-unit scale within propagated uncertainty

hardRejectConditions: bridge uses a coupling proxy statistic without a normalization convention
bridge derives separate W and Z scales with no shared-scale agreement check
bridge uncertainty is missing or unestimated
